# neon_project_vpc_endpoint_restriction (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a VPC endpoint restriction for a Neon project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_project_vpc_endpoint_restriction" "example" {
  project_id      = "your-project-id"
  vpc_endpoint_id = "your-vpc-endpoint-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.
- `vpc_endpoint_id` (String) The VPC endpoint ID.

### Read-Only

- `label` (String) A descriptive label for the VPC endpoint.
